exploration_notes: The search_file function is in file_ops.py (lines 344-373). It searches for a term in a given file or the currently open file (CURRENT_FILE global). It prints formatted output with match counts and line numbers. The existing test file at tests/unit/runtime/plugins/test_agent_skill.py has 3 existing tests for search_file (basic match, no match, nonexistent file) plus a fixture that resets CURRENT_FILE. The task requires writing a new comprehensive test_search_file at tests/unit/test_agent_skill.p
